mapper.select: SELECT tk.kkomi_no, tk.kkomi_lev, tk.kkomi_Exp FROM tbl_kkomi tk WHERE #{userNo} = tk.user_no

SELECT tk.kkomi_no, tk.kkomi_lev, tk.kkomi_Exp, tc.total_Amount, NVL(RANK() OVER(ORDER BY tr.Rank_Point DESC) as Ranking, 0) FROM tbl_kkomi tk JOIN tbl_ranking tr on (tk.user_no = tr.user_no) JOIN tbl_currenct tc on (tk.user_no = tc.user_no) WHERE tk.user_no = #{userNo} and tr.rank_season_info = TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(sysdate,'YYYYMM'))

SELECT * FROM (SELECT tr.user_no, tr.Rank_point as rankPoint, RANK() OVER(ORDER BY tr.Rank_Point DESC) AS ranking, tu.user_Nickname, tk.kkomi_Lev FROM TBL_RANKING tr JOIN TBL_USER tu ON tr.user_no = tu.user_no JOIN TBL_KKOMI tk ON tr.user_no = tk.user_no WHERE tr.rank_season_info = TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(sysdate,'YYYYMM'))) r WHERE r.ranking <= 10 or r.user_no = #{userNo} ORDER BY R.ranking;

SELECT tr.user_no, tr.Rank_point as rankPoint, RANK() OVER(ORDER BY tr.Rank_Point DESC) AS ranking, tnu.user_Nickname, tk.kkomi_Lev FROM TBL_RANKING tr JOIN TBL_NORMAL_USER tnu ON tr.user_no = tnu.user_no JOIN TBL_KKOMI tk ON tr.user_no = tk.user_no WHERE tr.rank_season_info = TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(sysdate,'YYYYMM')) AND tr.user_no = #{userNo}
mapper.merge: MERGE INTO TBL_RANKING tr USING( SELECT #{userNo} as user_no, TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(sysdate,'YYYYMM')) as curr_season FROM DUAL) src ON (src.user_no = tr.user_no and src.curr_season = tr.Rank_Season_Info) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET tr.rank_Point = tr.rank_Point + #{rankPoint} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (user_no, rank_point, rank_season_info) VALUES (src.user_no, #{rankPoint}, src.curr_season);
